parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  order_number,
  status,
  items,
  total,
  created_at,
  (NOW() - created_at) AS age
FROM orders 
WHERE order_number = '{{ $json.order_number }}'
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO returns (id, order_id, reason, items, status, created_at)
VALUES (
  (SELECT 'RET-' || TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY') || '-' || LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(id FROM 10 FOR 4) AS INTEGER)), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 4, '0') FROM returns WHERE id LIKE 'RET-' || TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY') || '-%'),
  {{ $json.order_id }},
  '{{ $json.reason }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.items) }}'::jsonb,
  'created',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id
